title: BoneToolCrafting
description:
You can now use sticks AND bones to craft tools,
BoneToolTexture resource-pack adds custom textures.
body:
## BoneToolCrafting

This datapack adds a set of crafting recipes for various tools, you can use Bones :). Great pack for Bones useage and BoneToolTexture adds textures for these recipes (NOT INCLUDED IN THIS DATAPACK).

### Recommended Resource Pack

For the full experience, we highly recommend using the **BoneToolTexture** resource pack. It adds custom textures for all the tools included in this datapack, making your Bone tools look like they're actually made of Bone! Using multiple recipe datapacks at the same time requires MoreToolTexture resource pack.

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b11ee6801918cd78a030b2b9176c72befea1807e.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bonetoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b451749006e4c9061c4b2279290cb3001d73b54.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bonetooltexture)

##                                Click the image to go to the respective page :)
 ###                                         Recipe = Data-Pack                                 Item = Resource-Pack


[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/583a4331887b42c5be918a0c895f0561824959c8.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bambootoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980e1fe6ed0c05b6a3175940fcaada51245fc12d.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bambootooltexture)       [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a6371e93b20e79e0f603666f37bf79093a4796.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazetoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706bf8d3436ceb36b8b7c0c9334c85c1a0fc6adf.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazetooltexture)       [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecd2a84a55ddfead6fff31ea3b3e66ed0c673dad.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/breezetoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b4681eb9cbf74a345e07b2cf8f3fa63f7e22591.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/breezetooltexture)

    * Copper Hoe

    * Copper Shovel
    * Copper Sword
    * Diamond Axe
    * Diamond Hoe
    * Diamond Pickaxe
    * Diamond Shovel
    * Diamond Sword
    * Iron Axe
    * Iron Hoe
    * Iron Pickaxe
    * Iron Shovel
    * Iron Sword
    * Golden Axe
    * Golden Hoe
    * Golden Pickaxe
    * Golden Shovel
    * Golden Sword
    * Stone Axe

    * Stone Pickaxe
    * Stone Shovel
    * Stone Sword
    * Wooden Axe
    * Wooden Hoe
    * Wooden Pickaxe
    * Wooden Shovel
    * Wooden Sword
    * Bow
    * Fishing Rod
    * Carrot on a Stick
    * Warped Fungus on a Stick
    * Brush
